action.prompt: This file was just created. Ensure it has a 1-line comment header explaining its purpose, as required by project conventions (AGENTS.md). If missing, add one.

A server-side file was modified. Review the change for security issues per .kiro/steering/security.md: check for string interpolation in DB queries, exposed API keys, missing input validation, raw user input in Gemini prompts, or missing // SECURITY: comments on critical code paths.
Check the saved file for monospace font usage (font-mono, font-family: monospace, Courier, Consolas). Purrward design rules forbid monospace fonts in user-facing UI. Flag any violations.
